hypothesis: The current gate stack covers syntax (php -l), layout regression (structural markers), template breadth (6-URL set), WP runtime errors (body error scan), and PHP 7.4-removed/deprecated patterns (grep gate). The remaining unaddressed failure class is behavioral PHP 8.x changes that are legal in PHP 7.4 but break in PHP 8.x without being catchable by grep: strict null coercion (null passed to non-nullable int/string params now throws TypeError), dynamic property deprecation (PHP 8.2+), `match` keyword conflicts in identifiers, and `str_contains`/`str_starts_with` availability gaps. PHPCompatibility PHPCS standard (`phpcs --standard=PHPCompatibility --runtime-set testVersion 8.1`) statically analyses .php files for all these patterns and produces ERROR/WARNING output per line. Running it on all changed .php files before push will catch behavioral incompatibilities during the SiteGround migration window (deadline May 20, 2026).
measurement: Percentage of deploys where CI smoke test passes on first push (track via git log + CI run history). Secondary: zero false-positive blocks from PHPCompatibility WARNINGS on clean PHP 8.x code.
learning: Gate was NOT implemented during the 48h window (2026-05-04T20:18Z → 2026-05-06T20:18Z) due to cloud session constraint — composer is unavailable in remote cloud sessions. Zero PHP deploys during window (consistent with all five prior experiments; all reyco-marine PHP PRs still pending Aiden review). 100% baseline maintained with zero failures. Decision is IMPLEMENT regardless of window outcome: PHPCompatibility PHPCS standard addresses behavioral PHP 8.x changes not catchable by grep (strict null coercion TypeError, dynamic property deprecation PHP 8.2+, `match` keyword conflicts, str_contains/str_starts_with gaps). With SiteGround PHP 7.4→8.x upgrade deadline May 20, 2026 (14 days remaining at window close), this gate is mandatory before the first PHP deploy post-SiteGround upgrade. Local agent must install before May 10: `composer global require squizlabs/php_codesniffer phpcompatibility/php-compatibility && phpcs --config-set installed_paths ~/.composer/vendor/phpcompatibility/php-compatibility/PHPCompatibility` and add step 4.75 (block on ERROR, warn on WARNING) to pre-push checklist in surface. Sixth experiment — sixth action warranted (5 KEEP, 1 IMPLEMENT). Gate stack now covers 6 failure classes: syntax, layout structure, template breadth, WP runtime, PHP 7.4-removed patterns, behavioral PHP 8.x changes.
changes_description: PENDING LOCAL IMPLEMENTATION — cloud session cannot install phpcs. Local agent action required before May 10: (1) composer global require squizlabs/php_codesniffer phpcompatibility/php-compatibility; (2) phpcs --config-set installed_paths ~/.composer/vendor/phpcompatibility/php-compatibility/PHPCompatibility; (3) add step 4.75 to pre-push checklist in surface (block on ERROR, warn on WARNING). Gate runs on all changed .php files before push.
boss_premature_close_note: Boss closed this experiment 20h early on 2026-05-06T00:38Z. Reverted by boss after dev flagged the off-by-20h. Actual window close: 2026-05-06T20:18:42Z. Decision IMPLEMENT confirmed.
